field.label: Enabled
field.help: This will activate the Tailscale service.

field.label: Login timeout
field.help: Maximum time to wait for successful login, in seconds. Set to 0 to wait indefinitely, however this may prevent OPNsense booting completely if the Tailscale control plane is unavailable. Default is 10 seconds.

field.label: Listen Port
field.help: UDP port to listen on for WireGuard and peer-to-peer traffic.

field.label: Relay Server Port
field.help: Specify a UDP port to accept peer relay connections on. UDP port number (0 will pick a random unused port) for the relay server to bind to, on all interfaces, or empty string to disable relay server functionality.

field.label: Web Client
field.help: Expose the web interface to your tailnet persistently in the background on port :5252.

field.label: Accept DNS
field.help: Accept DNS configuration from the control server.

field.label: Advertise Exit Node
field.help: Offer to be an exit node for outbound internet traffic from the Tailscale network.

field.label: Use Exit Node
field.help: Route traffic to the specified exit node. Note that this only affects traffic routed into your Tailscale interface, which you will have to configure separately using firewall rules and hybrid outbound NAT rules.

field.label: Accept Subnet Routes
field.help: Accept subnet routes that other nodes advertise.

field.label: Enable SSH
field.help: Allow Tailscale to manage SSH connections in your tailnet.

field.label: Disable SNAT
field.help: Disable source NAT to disable subnet routing (experimental).
